message:
chore(beads): update issue status for completed snippet quality track (2dccg.9.2)

Close bead 2dccg.9.2 (contextual snippet quality with wrap budgets and
fallback chain) — marking as completed with close reason noting all
deliverables: snippet quality improvements, wrap budgets, and fallback
chain plus associated tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -540,7 +540,7 @@
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","title":"Reintroduce contextual snippet quality (wrap budgets + fallback chain)","description":"## Goal
Improve snippet readability and information density in results rows without harming scan speed.

## Work Items
- Tune snippet line budgets by density mode
- Improve wrapping/truncation fallback behavior
- Ensure syntax-highlight fallback path remains stable

## Acceptance
- Snippets provide useful context in compact and spacious modes
- No broken wrapping artifacts on narrow terminals
- Snapshot diffs clearly validate snippet structure","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:28.935216143Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T23:16:57.622963208Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T23:16:57.622941988Z","close_reason":"Completed: snippet quality, wrap budgets, fallback chain + tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:28.935216143Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:52:34.405303011Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":375,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
1) Treat this bead title+description as the authoritative scope; do not rely on external planning docs.
2) Record touched files/functions and behavior surfaces in completion notes.
3) Provide deterministic before/after evidence (tests, snapshots, logs, or captures as applicable).
4) Validate across relevant themes/profiles/breakpoints/degradation levels for this surface.
5) Explicitly document tradeoffs, residual risks, and follow-up opportunities.
6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:35Z"},{"id":445,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed scope for `coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2` (snippet quality: density budgets, wrapping/truncation behavior, stable fallback chain).

## What changed
- `src/ui/app.rs`
  - `ResultItem` snippet pipeline now has an explicit fallback chain:
    - `hit.snippet` -> `hit.content` -> `hit.title` -> `"<no snippet>"`.
  - Added width-safe wrapping helpers:
    - `snippet_source()`
    - `char_boundary_at()`
    - `wrap_break_index()`
  - Reworked `snippet_lines()`:
    - hard width cap now respects narrow terminals (`max_width.max(8)` instead of forcing 20)
    - avoids empty wrapping artifacts
    - uses deterministic truncation (`...`) when line budget is exhausted
  - Added density-aware snippet budgeting:
    - `snippet_line_budget(max_width)`
    - compact/cozy/spacious behavior can now diverge intentionally under narrow widths.
  - Added compact-mode inline snippet context:
    - `compact_snippet_preview(max_width)`
    - row-height 2 now uses `score + source + snippet preview` (instead of metadata-only), restoring useful context in compact density.

## Tests added
- `result_item_snippet_fallback_chain_prefers_snippet_then_content_then_title`
- `result_item_snippet_wrapping_respects_narrow_width_without_empty_artifacts`
- `compact_density_results_row_includes_inline_snippet_preview`
- `spacious_density_allocates_three_snippet_lines_when_width_allows`
- Added helper `make_result_item(...)` for deterministic `ResultItem` construction in snippet tests.

## Validation evidence
- `cargo test result_item_snippet -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test compact_density_results_row_includes_inline_snippet_preview -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test spacious_density_allocates_three_snippet_lines_when_width_allows -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test tui_pty_search_detail_and_quit_flow --test e2e_tui_smoke_flows -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo check --all-targets` ✅
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
- `cargo fmt --check` ✅

## Acceptance mapping
- Snippets provide useful context in compact and spacious modes: ✅
  - compact rows now surface inline preview text.
  - spacious rows reserve multi-line snippet budget.
- No broken wrapping artifacts on narrow terminals: ✅
  - width-aware wrapping + truncation verified with narrow-width test.
- Snapshot-like deterministic structure validation: ✅
  - deterministic unit tests lock fallback/wrapping/budget behavior for regression detection.

## Tradeoffs / residual risk
- Compact mode now prefers snippet context over metadata tail on line 2; this improves scan usefulness but slightly reduces metadata visibility in 2-line rows.
- Full visual snapshot diff coverage for snippet structure is still owned by `coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5`; current lane provides deterministic behavioral tests as a stable base.
","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:16:51Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","title":"Restore score/source/remote/stripe hierarchy for high-speed result scanning","description":"## Goal
Reinstate critical scanning cues so relevance and provenance are parseable in milliseconds.

## Work Items
- Strengthen score bar presentation and consistency
- Reinforce source cues and remote tinting semantics
- Rebalance stripe hierarchy for row differentiation

## Acceptance
- Relevance and source context are visually obvious
- Styling remains theme-coherent and not noisy
- Low-capability modes preserve minimum differentiators","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:28.965673124Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T23:09:13.897535067Z","closed_at":"2026-02-08T23:09:01.700783008Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.10.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:52:38.012509088Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:28.965673124Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:52:42.203869826Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":376,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
1) Treat this bead title+description as the authoritative scope; do not rely on external planning docs.
2) Record touched files/functions and behavior surfaces in completion notes.
3) Provide deterministic before/after evidence (tests, snapshots, logs, or captures as applicable).

6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:35Z"},{"id":442,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureElk claim (2026-02-08): implementing score/source/stripe hierarchy for result scanning.","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:03:30Z"},{"id":443,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"AzureElk evidence: Added 3 semantic style tokens (STYLE_SOURCE_LOCAL, STYLE_SOURCE_REMOTE, STYLE_LOCATION). Source badges now use dedicated tokens — remote gets info+italic, local gets muted. Location paths use text_subtle via STYLE_LOCATION. 4 style_system tests (local vs remote fg distinct, remote italic, location has fg, scanning hierarchy ordered). Result row render uses new tokens for source badges and location lines. 94 style_system tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.","created_at":"2026-02-08T23:09:13Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","title":"Reconnect reveal/focus-flash animation state with performance guardrails","description":"## Goal
Restore meaningful motion cues without compromising frame budget stability.

## Work Items
- Wire existing animation state into live result rendering paths
- Add capability/degradation-aware animation suppression rules
- Validate behavior under heavy result counts

## Acceptance
- Motion improves orientation (not decorative noise)
- No frame-time regressions in stress scenarios
- Animation disabling paths remain deterministic","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.206602678Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T01:11:15.675446723Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T00:58:55.344400446Z","close_reason":"Motion guardrails finalized and validated; deterministic degraded suppression with full gate pass","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.10.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:52:42.962429746Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:57:48.053752836Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.206602678Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":377,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
1) Treat this bead title+description as the authoritative scope; do not rely on external planning docs.
2) Record touched files/functions and behavior surfaces in completion notes.
3) Provide deterministic before/after evidence (tests, snapshots, logs, or captures as applicable).
4) Validate across relevant themes/profiles/breakpoints/degradation levels for this surface.
5) Explicitly document tradeoffs, residual risks, and follow-up opportunities.
6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:35Z"},{"id":468,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"GoldHarbor takeover (2026-02-09): proceeding on this in-progress lane per explicit user directive to take over app.rs execution and drive work forward. I am running acceptance-focused validation and will either land any missing fixes or close with deterministic evidence.","created_at":"2026-02-09T00:47:10Z"},{"id":469,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"GoldHarbor completion closeout (2026-02-09): updated app motion guards so reveal/flash cues run only in Full degradation mode. Touched file: src/ui/app.rs in functions results_reveal_motion_enabled and results_focus_flash_intensity. Validation: cargo test results_reveal_affects_full_mode_but_is_suppressed_when_degraded; cargo test focus_flash_glyph_only_renders_when_motion_policy_allows; cargo test search_completed_large_result_set_starts_reveal_sequence; cargo test search_completed_small_result_set_clears_reveal_sequence; cargo test focus_flash_disabled_returns_zero_intensity; cargo test tui_pty_search_detail_and_quit_flow --test e2e_tui_smoke_flows -- --nocapture; cargo check --all-targets; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo fmt --check. Acceptance met: meaningful motion in Full mode, deterministic suppression in degraded modes, no gate regressions. Residual risk: policy is intentionally strict; future SimpleBorders motion would need explicit policy+tests.","created_at":"2026-02-09T00:58:47Z"},{"id":470,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution evidence for `coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4` (2026-02-09)

Scope delivered
- Reconnected results-surface reveal/focus-flash motion state into live rendering with deterministic performance guardrails.
- Enforced suppression of decorative motion outside full-fidelity mode to keep degraded rendering deterministic.

Touched files/functions/surfaces
- `src/ui/app.rs`
  - Guardrail constants: `RESULTS_REVEAL_MIN_HITS` / `RESULTS_REVEAL_MAX_HITS` (`src/ui/app.rs:224`).
  - Animation lifecycle: `AnimationState::clear_reveal()` (`src/ui/app.rs:416`).
  - Render payload plumbing: `ResultItem { reveal_progress, focus_flash_intensity }` (`src/ui/app.rs:2266`).
  - Motion policy helpers: `results_reveal_motion_enabled(...)` + `results_focus_flash_intensity(...)` (`src/ui/app.rs:4608`).
  - Results pane wiring now passes reveal/focus values into each row (`src/ui/app.rs:4650`, `src/ui/app.rs:4723`).
  - Search completion now only starts reveal in bounded hit range and clears stale reveal state otherwise (`src/ui/app.rs:9441`, `src/ui/app.rs:9447`).
  - View path computes reveal/focus policy once and routes it through pane rendering (`src/ui/app.rs:12492`).

Behavioral outcomes
- Reveal animation triggers only for medium/large-but-bounded result sets (`6..=400`) where scan-orientation benefit is real.
- Reveal/focus cues are disabled in degraded modes (`!DegradationLevel::Full`) to prevent noisy or non-deterministic low-fidelity output.
- Selected-row focus cue (`✦`) appears only when motion policy allows and focus flash intensity is active.

Deterministic evidence (tests)
- Added tests:
  - `animation_clear_reveal_resets_state` (`src/ui/app.rs:21992`)
  - `search_completed_large_result_set_starts_reveal_sequence` (`src/ui/app.rs:22003`)
  - `search_completed_small_result_set_clears_reveal_sequence` (`src/ui/app.rs:22029`)
  - `results_reveal_affects_full_mode_but_is_suppressed_when_degraded` (`src/ui/app.rs:22058`)
  - `focus_flash_glyph_only_renders_when_motion_policy_allows` (`src/ui/app.rs:22107`)
- Validation run (all pass):
  - `cargo test animation_ -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test search_completed_large_result_set_starts_reveal_sequence -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test search_completed_small_result_set_clears_reveal_sequence -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test results_reveal_affects_full_mode_but_is_suppressed_when_degraded -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo test focus_flash_glyph_only_renders_when_motion_policy_allows -- --nocapture`
  - `cargo fmt --check`
  - `cargo check --all-targets`
  - `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`

Tradeoffs / rationale
- Suppressing motion below full degradation intentionally prefers readability determinism over decorative continuity.
- Hit-count gating avoids animation overhead and visual churn on tiny or massive result sets where reveal value is low.

Residual risks
- Snapshot baselines for results rows were not regenerated in this lane; if glyph/layout deltas are expected, follow-up snapshot updates may be needed by results-regression owners.
- Real terminal profile variance (font metrics, unicode rendering) can still subtly affect perceived motion quality despite deterministic logic.

Follow-up opportunities
- If profiling data supports it, tune the reveal hit-window bounds per terminal capability profile rather than fixed constants.
- Add explicit snapshot assertions for reveal-cue glyph presence/absence under Full vs degraded mode in `2dccg.9.5`.
","created_at":"2026-02-09T01:01:02Z"},{"id":471,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Animation state confirmed fully wired: 5 springs (focus_flash, peek_badge, panel_ratio, modal_open, reveal) + per-item reveal_springs vector. Degradation-aware via render_decorative(). 7 new stress tests cover: reveal springs capped at MAX_ANIMATED_ITEMS (15), hit-range gating (6-400), disabled-animation snap, focus flash zero when unfocused/disabled, 200-hit render with animation. 3 legacy timestamp fields (reveal_anim_start, focus_flash_until, peek_badge_until) are maintained but disconnected — kept for compatibility.","created_at":"2026-02-09T01:11:15Z"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","title":"Add results-surface regression suite (density, snippets, score cues, focus behavior)","description":"## Goal
Protect results-surface rendering with tests that verify density, snippets, score cues, and focus behavior remain correct after polish changes.

## Scope Boundary (Canonical)
This bead is the **single owner** of results-surface regression coverage.
- Includes: grouped pane chrome, density behavior, snippet quality, score/source hierarchy, focus/navigation cues on results surfaces.
- Excludes: search-surface regression ownership (`2dccg.8.6`), global interaction state-machine routing ownership (`2dccg.11.2`), cross-theme/degradation matrix aggregation (`2dccg.6.3`), and end-to-end workflow playback ownership (`2dccg.11.3`).
- Must consume fixture foundations from `2dccg.6.1`/`2dccg.6.2` rather than duplicating equivalent fixture builders.

## Test Scenarios

### Density Tests
- Compact mode: minimum vertical space per result (measure line count).
- Cozy mode: readable spacing between metadata elements.
- Spacious mode: generous padding for presentation contexts.
- Mode switching preserves scroll position and selected item.

### Snippet Tests
- Snippet wrapping respects available width (no horizontal overflow).
- Fallback chain: rendered snippet -> raw text -> 'No preview available'.
- Long snippets truncate with ellipsis at configured budget.
- Highlight matches within snippets use correct search-match style.

### Score/Hierarchy Tests
- Score indicator uses STYLE_SCORE_HIGH/MED/LOW based on thresholds.
- Source badge renders with agent-specific accent color.
- Remote/local indicator is visually distinct.
- Metadata stripe (date, host, tokens) is scannable at speed.
- Selected result has clear focus indicator distinct from hover.

### Focus/Navigation Tests
- Arrow keys move selection with visible focus change.
- Page up/down moves by viewport-worth of results.
- Home/End jumps to first/last result.
- Focus persists through theme switch and filter changes.

## Logging
- Each test logs: test_id, result_index, density_mode, expected_layout, actual_layout.
- Failures include viewport size, result count, scroll offset.
- Emit structured logs compatible with `2dccg.11.6`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Results-pane regressions from ftui migration are caught.
- Tests cover all 3 density modes x at least 2 themes.
- Test suite runs in < 3s headless.
- Suite composes with `2dccg.6.2`/`2dccg.6.3`/`2dccg.11.x` without duplicative ownership.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.280452749Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T01:17:44.452243832Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T01:17:44.452218164Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:33.962681011Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:46:16.758850809Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.280452749Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:06.146525077Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:04.904357753Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:13.372288885Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:15.887247675Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:30.833800805Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":378,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:
1) Treat this bead title+description as the authoritative scope; do not rely on external planning docs.
2) Record touched files/functions and behavior surfaces in completion notes.
3) Provide deterministic before/after evidence (tests, snapshots, logs, or captures as applicable).
4) Validate across relevant themes/profiles/breakpoints/degradation levels for this surface.
5) Explicitly document tradeoffs, residual risks, and follow-up opportunities.
6) Do not close until acceptance criteria are demonstrably satisfied with linked evidence artifacts.","created_at":"2026-02-08T20:45:36Z"},{"id":424,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Planning-space optimization pass (2026-02-08): tightened canonical scope boundaries to remove test ownership overlap while preserving full feature/test intent. Explicit include/exclude contracts now separate component-level, surface-level, policy-matrix, and cross-cutting verification responsibilities so parallel execution is safer and less duplicative.","created_at":"2026-02-08T22:04:11Z"},{"id":472,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Results-surface regression suite complete. Coverage summary: Score cues: score_style threshold routing verified (HIGH>=8.0, MID>=5.0, LOW<5.0) with boundary values. Selection: selected row has distinct bg from default across Dark/Light presets. Navigation: arrow key moves verified (delta +1/-1, clamp at 0). Pre-existing tests: density×theme matrix (6 combos), density switch preserves selection+scroll, snippet ellipsis, page/home/end navigation, focus persistence through theme+filter, snippet fallback chain, snippet wrapping, source badge local/remote. Meta-test: 3-density render cycle under 1s headless.","created_at":"2026-02-09T01:17:35Z"}]}
+{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","title":"Add results-surface regression suite (density, snippets, score cues, focus behavior)","description":"## Goal
Protect results-surface rendering with tests that verify density, snippets, score cues, and focus behavior remain correct after polish changes.

## Scope Boundary (Canonical)
This bead is the **single owner** of results-surface regression coverage.
- Includes: grouped pane chrome, density behavior, snippet quality, score/source hierarchy, focus/navigation cues on results surfaces.
- Excludes: search-surface regression ownership (`2dccg.8.6`), global interaction state-machine routing ownership (`2dccg.11.2`), cross-theme/degradation matrix aggregation (`2dccg.6.3`), and end-to-end workflow playback ownership (`2dccg.11.3`).
- Must consume fixture foundations from `2dccg.6.1`/`2dccg.6.2` rather than duplicating equivalent fixture builders.

## Test Scenarios

### Density Tests
- Compact mode: minimum vertical space per result (measure line count).
- Cozy mode: readable spacing between metadata elements.
- Spacious mode: generous padding for presentation contexts.
- Mode switching preserves scroll position and selected item.

### Snippet Tests
- Snippet wrapping respects available width (no horizontal overflow).
- Fallback chain: rendered snippet -> raw text -> 'No preview available'.
- Long snippets truncate with ellipsis at configured budget.
- Highlight matches within snippets use correct search-match style.

### Score/Hierarchy Tests
- Score indicator uses STYLE_SCORE_HIGH/MED/LOW based on thresholds.
- Source badge renders with agent-specific accent color.
- Remote/local indicator is visually distinct.
- Metadata stripe (date, host, tokens) is scannable at speed.
- Selected result has clear focus indicator distinct from hover.

### Focus/Navigation Tests
- Arrow keys move selection with visible focus change.
- Page up/down moves by viewport-worth of results.
- Home/End jumps to first/last result.
- Focus persists through theme switch and filter changes.

## Logging
- Each test logs: test_id, result_index, density_mode, expected_layout, actual_layout.
- Failures include viewport size, result count, scroll offset.
- Emit structured logs compatible with `2dccg.11.6`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Results-pane regressions from ftui migration are caught.
- Tests cover all 3 density modes x at least 2 themes.

Explicit include/exclude contracts now separate component-level, surface-level, policy-matrix, and cross-cutting verification responsibilities so parallel execution is safer and less duplicative.","created_at":"2026-02-08T22:04:11Z"},{"id":472,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Results-surface regression suite complete. Coverage summary: Score cues: score_style threshold routing verified (HIGH>=8.0, MID>=5.0, LOW<5.0) with boundary values. Selection: selected row has distinct bg from default across Dark/Light presets. Navigation: arrow key moves verified (delta +1/-1, clamp at 0). Pre-existing tests: density×theme matrix (6 combos), density switch preserves selection+scroll, snippet ellipsis, page/home/end navigation, focus persistence through theme+filter, snippet fallback chain, snippet wrapping, source badge local/remote. Meta-test: 3-density render cycle under 1s headless.","created_at":"2026-02-09T01:17:35Z"},{"id":487,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Post-close stabilization note (2026-02-09): results navigation regression test semantic fix

Context
- While re-running the 2dccg.9.5 verification subset, `results_navigation_page_scroll_and_home_end_are_stable` failed with:
  - `expected=advance actual=0`
- Root cause: `CassMsg::PageScrolled` updates `VirtualizedListState.scroll_offset`, not `pane.selected`.

Fix applied
- Updated test in `src/ui/app.rs` to assert page movement using `results_list_state.scroll_offset()`.
- Added explicit pre-render in test to initialize virtualized viewport state before paging assertions.
- Home/End assertions still validate selection jump behavior (`SelectionJumped`).

Touched location
- `src/ui/app.rs:16334` (`results_navigation_page_scroll_and_home_end_are_stable`)

Validation evidence
- `cargo test --lib results_navigation_page_scroll_and_home_end_are_stable -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib results_surface_density_theme_matrix_preserves_core_cues -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib density_mode_switch_preserves_selection_and_scroll_state -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib snippet_budget_exhaustion_uses_ellipsis_on_last_line -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib results_focus_persists_through_theme_and_filter_changes -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib result_item_snippet_fallback_chain_prefers_snippet_then_content_then_title -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib result_item_snippet_wrapping_respects_narrow_width_without_empty_artifacts -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib compact_density_results_row_includes_inline_snippet_preview -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib spacious_density_allocates_three_snippet_lines_when_width_allows -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo test --lib result_item_source_badge_reflects_local_and_remote_provenance -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo fmt --check` ✅
- `cargo check --all-targets` ✅
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅

Tradeoff
- The test now reflects actual page-scroll behavior (offset movement) rather than conflating scroll with selection movement.
","created_at":"2026-02-09T04:32:00Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","title":"Retune compact/cozy/spacious density modes to match documented intent","description":"## Goal
Make density modes distinctly useful and predictable for different terminal sizes/workflows.

## Work Items
- Rebalance row heights, snippet budgets, and spacing per density preset
- Validate transitions between modes in live session
- Ensure each preset has clear rationale and docs alignment

## Acceptance
- Users can intentionally choose density based on task context
- Density mode differences are obvious and stable
- Snapshot coverage validates all three modes","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.801479264Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T00:46:07.561553305Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T00:46:07.561532035Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:46:42.801479264Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:11.693157427Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-08T19:53:03.512756314Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":379,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dccg.9.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Execution contract for this task:

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dll","title":"T4.1: Error recovery E2E tests","description":"Add comprehensive error recovery E2E tests.

## Scenarios to Cover
1. Corrupted database recovery
2. Interrupted indexing resume
3. Failed export rollback
4. Network timeout handling
5. Disk full scenarios
6. Permission denied recovery

## Test Structure
- Each scenario: setup_corruption -> attempt_operation -> verify_recovery
- Log all recovery steps with phase markers
- Verify data integrity after recovery

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Database corruption recovery tested
- [ ] Indexing interruption tested
- [ ] Export failure tested
- [ ] All tests use E2eLogger","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T04:23:09.844495082Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T05:56:50.363285217Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T05:56:50.363135880Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2dll","depends_on_id":"2ieo","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:00:34Z","created_by":"import"}]}
